So the code outline is:

class Solution {
public:
    int numberOfStableArrays(int zero, int one, int limit) {
        const int MOD = 1e9 +7;
        // memo table: memo[last][z][o] = ways
        // last can be 0 or 1
        vector<vector<vector<int>>> memo(2, vector<vector<int>>(zero+1, vector<int>(one+1, -1)));
        function<int(int, int, int)> dp = [&](int last, int z, int o) {
            if (z == 0 && o == 0) return 1;
            if (z <0 || o <0) return 0;
            if (memo[last][z][o] != -1) return memo[last][z][o];
            int res =0;
            if (last ==0) {
                // next is 1
                int max_l = min(o, limit);
                for (int l=1; l<=max_l; ++l) {
                    res += dp(1, z, o - l);
                    res %= MOD;
                }
            } else {
                // next is 0
                int max_l = min(z, limit);
                for (int l=1; l<=max_l; ++l) {
                    res += dp(0, z - l, o);
                    res %= MOD;
                }
            }
            memo[last][z][o] = res;
            return res;
        };
        int start_with_0 = 0;
        if (zero >0) {
            int max_l = min(zero, limit);
            for (int l=1; l<=max_l; ++l) {
                start_with_0 += dp(0, zero - l, one);
                start_with_0 %= MOD;
            }
        }
        int start_with_1 =0;
        if (one >0) {
            int max_l = min(one, limit);
            for (int l=1; l<=max_l; ++l) {
                start_with_1 += dp(1, zero, one - l);
                start_with_1 %= MOD;
            }
        }
        int total = (start_with_0 + start_with_1) % MOD;
        return total;
    }
};

So the code outline is:

class Solution {
public:
    int numberOfStableArrays(int zero, int one, int limit) {
        const int MOD = 1e9 +7;
        // memo table: memo[last][z][o] = ways
        // last can be 0 or 1
        vector<vector<vector<int>>> memo(2, vector<vector<int>>(zero+1, vector<int>(one+1, -1)));
        function<int(int, int, int)> dp = [&](int last, int z, int o) {
            if (z == 0 && o == 0) return 1;
            if (z <0 || o <0) return 0;
            if (memo[last][z][o] != -1) return memo[last][z][o];
            int res =0;
            if (last ==0) {
                // next is 1
                int max_l = min(o, limit);
                for (int l=1; l<=max_l; ++l) {
                    res += dp(1, z, o - l);
                    res %= MOD;
                }
            } else {
                // next is 0
                int max_l = min(z, limit);
                for (int l=1; l<=max_l; ++l) {
                    res += dp(0, z - l, o);
                    res %= MOD;
                }
            }
            memo[last][z][o] = res;
            return res;
        };
        int start_with_0 = 0;
        if (zero >0) {
            int max_l = min(zero, limit);
            for (int l=1; l<=max_l; ++l) {
                start_with_0 += dp(0, zero - l, one);
                start_with_0 %= MOD;
            }
        }
        int start_with_1 =0;
        if (one >0) {
            int max_l = min(one, limit);
            for (int l=1; l<=max_l; ++l) {
                start_with_1 += dp(1, zero, one - l);
                start_with_1 %= MOD;
            }
        }
        int total = (start_with_0 + start_with_1) % MOD;
        return total;
    }
};
